event_comments: Reviewed newsletter canonicalization wave 2026-03-21 (1983-1987) merged duplicate event e897888b-417a-5a35-802c-8f230e4b3d26 ("THIRD ANNUNAL HIGH CASCADE MEET"). Reason: schedule duplicate with OCR typo. Notes: The Aug. 20-21, 1983 Irish & Taylor Lakes meet appears twice with ANNUNAL / HIGH CASCADE typo drift. The OSUOC schedule line is the clearest organizer attribution.
